# Dynamic Friction

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

The expectations of online consumers have drastically changed in recent years. Not so long ago, shipping times hovered in the 2-4 week range. Now, even 2-4 days seems like an eternity to wait. Consumers want the least amount of friction in their online experiences — from account creation to checkout and beyond.

Read this ebook to learn:

*   The fundamentals of Dynamic Friction
*   How to deliver custom user experiences based on risk
*   Why multi-factor authentication is critical to stopping account takeover

### Download the Ebook

Get the Ebook
